acceptance.assertion: Task intake or Registry validation reports a stable fail-closed finding when a newly proposed nonterminal Bureau task uses repo.bureau and one or more existing component.bureau.* resources can cover the declared implementation scope.

A genuinely repository-wide Bureau change may retain repo.bureau only through explicit reviewable justification; the exception is never inferred from missing scope data and missing justification fails closed.

Regression coverage reproduces the post-T013 condition observed on OPERATOR-INTEGRATION-LOOP-V1-T009 and proves that equivalent future broad-claim regressions are rejected before publication or surfaced as a blocking Doctor finding.
Terminal historical tasks and previously verified migration receipts remain unchanged; the new ratchet applies prospectively or through separately reviewed migrations only.
Targeted tests, full Bureau validation, git diff --check and a head/diff-bound self-review pass on the exact implementation head before merge.

approval.note: Follow-up from the live T009 closeout. Keep scope exact and do not rewrite terminal historical tasks.

goal: Make Bureau task registration and validation fail closed when a new nonterminal task claims repo.bureau even though existing exact Bureau component resources can express its real conflict boundary, while preserving an explicit reviewed escape hatch for genuinely repository-wide work.

does_not_establish: automatic migration of existing broad claims
permission to rewrite terminal task history

title: Prevent broad Bureau claim regressions after exact-scope migration
